author: Joe Workman
title: Brazil Summer Olympics
summary: This year, the Olympics will be in Brazil. I plan on spending the entire summer down in Brazil, having a blast and not caring about anything else in the world. Literally cronut kogi man bun sustainable. 8-bit neutra heirloom hella franzen.
